jobs.title: Associate Director, Commercial Analytics - Oncology
jobs.description:
Lead commercial analytics for the oncology portfolio
Partner with brand teams on HCP targeting and segmentation using IQVIA and Symphony Health claims data
Build forecasting models and Tableau dashboards tracking TRx NRx and patient journey metrics
Translate ambiguous business questions into analytical workplans for launch brands
Requires advanced degree and experience with Python SQL and real-world data

jobs.title: Associate Director, Business Insights - Oncology
jobs.description:
Drive business insights for Zepzelca and Rylaze franchises
Own market research segmentation and competitive intelligence deliverables
Develop customer analytics using claims data and Veeva CRM
Present insights to senior commercial leadership

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Data Strategy - R&D Pipeline
jobs.description:
Shape data strategy for R&D pipeline analytics and portfolio strategy
Define roadmap for clinical trial and real-world evidence data products
Cross-functional leadership with data science and machine learning teams
PhD preferred with bioinformatics or genomics background

jobs.title: Director, Customer Analytics
jobs.description:
Lead customer analytics center of excellence
Oversee HCP segmentation forecasting and omnichannel measurement
Manage team of analysts using Python SQL and Tableau
Partner with market access and payer analytics

jobs.title: Senior Director, Commercial Data Strategy
jobs.description:
Set enterprise commercial data strategy across therapeutic areas
Govern IQVIA Komodo and claims data assets
Requires 12+ years commercial pharma analytics leadership

jobs.title: Associate Director, Analytics & Insights
jobs.description:
Lead analytics and insights for seed portfolio
Genomics and field sensor data strategy
Build dashboards and machine learning models for pipeline innovation

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Commercial Insights
jobs.description:
Commercial insights for cystic fibrosis franchise
Market research and forecasting
